filters.implementation: Use stmt_offsets index to skip the row range for the empty-string dict code entirely, avoiding per-row predicate checks

scan.strategy: Use stmt_offsets to iterate only over non-null stmt_code ranges. For each valid stmt_code, scan the contiguous row range [start, end) and read rfile_code, sub_fk, line columns at those offsets.

data_structures.aggregation: direct_2d_array[9][2] of AggState structs per thread
data_structures.notes: 18 groups max (9 stmt codes × 2 rfile codes). Each thread has a thread-local 2D array of AggState. Bitset for COUNT(DISTINCT sub_fk): 86135 bits ≈ 10.5 KB per group, 18 groups ≈ 189 KB per thread. With 64 threads ≈ 12 MB total — fits comfortably in L3 cache (44 MB).

aggregation.merge: OR bitsets across threads for distinct count; SUM counts and sum_line across threads

parallelism.notes: Partition row ranges across threads. Each thread maintains thread-local AggState[9][2]. Merge all thread-local states after scan completes.

indexes.purpose: skip_null_rows — identify and skip the row range for the empty-string stmt_code, iterate only non-null code ranges

dictionary_decoding.purpose: Decode stmt_code to string for output; identify empty-string code for IS NOT NULL filter
Decode rfile_code to string for output
